component.name: TurtleTerm
component.summary: Trusted terminal sessions, command receipts, and agent-governed execution

description.p: TurtleTerm is a SourceOS terminal workbench for trusted command execution, terminal receipts, agent delegation, and reproducible operator workflows.
It provides TurtleTerm launchers, a TurtleTerm profile, a local agent gateway, tmux bridge, skill manifests, and release verification surfaces.
